description: Declares name: mem0 (v0.1.1), identical to skills/mem0/SKILL.md (v3.0.0); skill loader cannot distinguish them by name, causing stale content to silently shadow the current version
suggested_fix: Rename plugin-bundled copy to a distinct name (e.g., mem0-plugin-bundled) or remove the duplicate and have the plugin reference the standalone skills/ copy

description: PostHog public capture key (phc_hgJkUVJFYtmaJqrvf6CYN67TIQ8yhXAkWzUn9AMU4yX) hardcoded in inline Python; indicates undisclosed third-party telemetry dependency
suggested_fix: Add a named constant with a comment labeling it a public analytics key and document it in the project's configuration surface

description: Migration script sends authenticated user email and OS info (platform, version, machine) to PostHog (us.i.posthog.com) without any disclosure in script output; opt-out via MEM0_TELEMETRY=false is not mentioned to the user
suggested_fix: Before the first capture_migration_event call, print a one-line disclosure that anonymous telemetry is collected and can be disabled with MEM0_TELEMETRY=false

description: SessionStart hook makes HTTP POST with MEM0_API_KEY to api.mem0.ai/v1/memories/, transmitting parsed session transcript content; intended plugin behavior but users should be aware conversation data is transmitted outbound
suggested_fix: Ensure plugin installation documentation clearly states that conversation summary data is sent to api.mem0.ai on session events; no code change needed if behavior is disclosed

description: Stop and PreCompact hooks make HTTP POST with MEM0_API_KEY to api.mem0.ai/v1/memories/ in background process, transmitting parsed transcript content; same disclosure concern as capture_compact_summary.py
suggested_fix: Same as capture_compact_summary.py finding — disclosure in documentation is the appropriate fix

description: Authorization header template uses Token ${MEM0_API_KEY}; standard MCP auth pattern, key is injected at runtime from env, not hardcoded
suggested_fix: No code change needed; ensure documentation notes that MEM0_API_KEY is required at plugin install time

description: High vague-quantifier density: relevant (x2), significant (x2), important (x2), genuinely (x3), notable (x1), comprehensive (x1) — 11 instances, penalty capped at -20
suggested_fix: Replace with measurable criteria: e.g., 'significant decision' -> 'decision with rationale or trade-off'; 'genuinely new' -> 'fact not present in recalled memories'

description: Example headings 11 and 12 each appear twice in the file (mixed-categories example and consolidation example both labeled Example 11; greeting NOOP appears twice as Example 12)
suggested_fix: Renumber examples sequentially: the second Example 11 should be Example 13 and the second Example 12 should be Example 14

description: Description states the skill triggers automatically after sufficient activity (configurable) but no hook in hooks.json invokes this skill; the auto-trigger is not implemented
suggested_fix: Remove the auto-trigger claim from description, or add a hook that invokes the skill after a configurable activity threshold

description: Vague quantifiers: 'sufficient activity' in description, 'obvious problems' in Phase 1 step 4
suggested_fix: Replace 'sufficient activity' with a measurable threshold; replace 'obvious problems' with 'duplicates, entries under 10 words, or entries missing temporal anchors'

description: Plugin-bundled mem0 skill is version 0.1.1 while standalone skills/mem0/SKILL.md is 3.0.0; content diverges in cross-reference style (GitHub URLs vs. local paths) with no documented sync mechanism
suggested_fix: Establish one authoritative copy and document update procedure in CONTRIBUTING; or bump plugin-bundled copy to match standalone on each release

description: Vague quantifiers: 'appropriate' (line 51 'if appropriate, call get_memories'), 'significant' (line 61 'significant time has passed'), and multiple uses of 'relevant memories'
suggested_fix: Replace 'if appropriate' with explicit criteria; replace 'significant time' with a concrete duration like 'more than 30 minutes'

description: Vague quantifiers across 620-line pipeline skill: 'relevant' (x2), 'plausible' (plan section), 'non-trivial' (description), 'minimal' (dependency surface)
suggested_fix: Replace 'plausible call site' with 'file and line range containing an LLM call site'; replace 'non-trivial task' with measurable complexity criteria

description: Shares name: mem0 with mem0-plugin/skills/mem0/SKILL.md (v0.1.1); without resolving Bug #1, load-time behavior is non-deterministic
suggested_fix: Coordinate with Bug #1 fix — this copy should be the canonical v3.0.0 once the plugin-bundled duplicate is renamed or removed

description: Two SKILL.md files in the same repo both declare name: mem0; plugin-bundled copy (v0.1.1) and standalone copy (v3.0.0) will conflict when both skill paths are on the load path
suggested_fix: Rename plugin-bundled skill or establish one authoritative copy; update hooks.json skills list accordingly

description: Plugin-bundled mem0 skill at v0.1.1 is 2 major versions behind standalone v3.0.0; API surface, filter syntax, and compatibility notes differ between the two copies
suggested_fix: Pin plugin-bundled version to match standalone on each release, or remove the plugin-bundled copy and load from skills/ directory

description: memory-dream description claims automatic invocation after sufficient activity (configurable) but no entry in hooks.json triggers this skill; the auto-trigger path is an orphaned claim
suggested_fix: Either remove the auto-trigger claim or add a hook entry that invokes the skill on a configurable activity signal
